description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a DOCKER_DRIVER variable set to overlay2. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs only for tag pipelines. In the build job, execute the following shell commands in order: `mkdir gopath && docker run --rm -v \"$PWD/gopath\":/go -v \"$PWD\":/usr/src/kubehiera -w /usr/src/kubehiera golang:1.8 go get -d -v .`, then `docker run --rm -v \"$PWD/gopath\":/go -v \"$PWD\":/usr/src/kubehiera -w /usr/src/kubehiera -e GOOS=darwin -e GOARCH=amd64 golang:1.8 go build -v -o kubehiera-darwin-amd64`, then `docker run --rm -v \"$PWD/gopath\":/go -v \"$PWD\":/usr/src/kubehiera -w /usr/src/kubehiera -e GOOS=linux -e GOARCH=amd64 golang:1.8 go build -v -o kubehiera-linux-amd64`, and finally `docker run --rm -v \"$PWD/gopath\":/go -v \"$PWD\":/usr/src/kubehiera -w /usr/src/kubehiera -e GOOS=windows -e GOARCH=amd64 golang:1.8 go build -v -o kubehiera-windows-amd64`. Archive all files matching kubehiera* as an artifact named kubehiera-${CI_COMMIT_TAG}.
